title: CharacterData
description: Schema for a single character (base or support) in the Remaster Engine. Minimal version covering the PoC's data needs per §15.4 Step 1 of the design document.

id.description: Lowercase snake_case identifier. Used as filename and lookup key.

element.description: Color element. Per §3.4 of the design document, 6 elements are locked.

level.description: Current level. Per §3.8 locked level-based progression, level determines tier slot unlocks.

is_base.description: True if this is one of the 6 main bases (Serge, Kidd, Nikki, Glenn, Herle, Norris). False for support characters.

basic_attack.description: Display name of the basic attack line. Always present, always relevant. Per §3.5 locked basic-attack-line model.

tier_1_tech.description: Tier 1 magic slot tech. Per §3.7 locked per-base techs.

tier_8_tech.description: Tier 8 magic slot tech. The character's ultimate ability. Per §3.7 locked per-base techs.

innate.description: Innate role. Per §3.4 color-tier assignments: red=steal, blue=performance, green=combat, black=dark, yellow=healer, white=base.

support_slots.description: List of support characters attached to this base at specific tiers. Per §3.5 locked support-augmentation model.

sprite.description: Path to the character's field sprite. Empty string = placeholder rectangle per §15.3 PoC scope.

portrait.description: Path to the character's portrait. Empty string = placeholder.
